_comment: Western University OWeek app — parent POI map pins only. Spoke and Wave resolve to UCC pin. Coordinates are OSM-derived centroids, accurate to building footprint. Verify against openstreetmap.org before production.

properties.name: Amit Chakma Engineering Building
properties.description: Western's newest engineering building on the Western Road edge of campus.

properties.name: Concrete Beach
properties.description: The open paved square outside the UCC. A central hangout and event space.

properties.name: Health Sciences Building
properties.description: Home to Western's health sciences programs on the north end of central campus.

properties.name: Huron Quad
properties.description: The outdoor quad at Huron University College. A common OWeek event space.

properties.name: King's University College
properties.description: An affiliated Catholic liberal arts college at the south edge of campus.

properties.name: McKellar Theatre
properties.description: A theatre venue in Talbot College used for performances and OWeek events.

properties.name: Recreation Centre
properties.description: Western's main rec facility. Pool, gyms, fitness classes, intramurals.

properties.name: Ronald D. Schmeichel Building
properties.description: Western's entrepreneurship and innovation hub. Maker spaces, flexible learning, central campus location.

properties.name: Somerville House
properties.description: Home to the Great Hall and Green Leaf Cafe. Used for large formal events.

properties.name: Talbot College
properties.description: Home to the Don Wright Faculty of Music and Kenny Theatre.

properties.name: Thames Hall
properties.description: Central academic building next to Concrete Beach and the UCC.

properties.name: UC Hill
properties.description: The grassy hill on campus. A key gathering spot and OWeek landmark.

properties.name: University Community Centre
properties.description: Western's student hub. The Spoke, The Wave, USC offices, and most student services are here.
properties._note: The Spoke and The Wave resolve to this pin.

properties.name: Western Alumni Stadium
properties.description: Main outdoor stadium. Home of Mustang football and large OWeek concerts.

properties.name: Bayfield Hall
properties.description: Hybrid-style residence in the Glenmore complex near Saugeen and Lambton.

properties.name: Clare Hall
properties.description: Hybrid-style newer residence on the south end of campus.

properties.name: Delaware Hall
properties.description: Traditional-style first-year residence on the east side of campus.

properties.name: Elgin Hall
properties.description: Suite-style residence on the far east side of campus near Delaware.

properties.name: Essex Hall
properties.description: Suite-style residence in the south-central area of campus.

properties.name: Lambton Hall
properties.description: Suite-style residence on Western Road near the university hospital.

properties.name: Medway-Sydenham Hall
properties.description: Traditional-style residence on University Drive. Third largest on campus.

properties.name: Ontario Hall
properties.description: Newer hybrid-style residence in the south end of campus.

properties.name: Perth Hall
properties.description: Hybrid-style residence in the south campus near Platt's Lane.

properties.name: Saugeen Hall
properties.description: The largest residence on campus. Traditional-style, 1,252 students, Windermere Road.
